name: Liver Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb beef liver or calf's liver
1 large red pepper, cut into 12 pieces
1 large green pepper, cut into 12 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the first five ingredients. Simmer over low heat for 3 minutes. Set aside to cool.
2. Cut the liver into strips that are similar in size to slices of bacon.
3. Place one strip of liver on each slice of bacon. Alternate vegetables (red and green peppers and onions) with meat slices on skewers, securing them tightly.
4. Brush the kabobs with the sauce.
5. Grill over hot coals for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the bacon is crisp and the liver reaches your desired level of doneness.
SOURCE: Southern Living Magazine, sometime in 1980.
